title: Add assignee picker to task detail page
implementation_notes: In the task detail page (/pages/tasks/[task].vue), add an Assignee field to the task metadata sidebar/panel.
Fetch the agent registry from the read model: const agents = selectAgentRegistry(model).
Show current assignee (task.assignee) as a label. If null, show '— Unassigned'.
Next to the label, add an 'Edit' pencil icon button. On click: show a <select> dropdown listing all agents by name, plus a '— Unassigned' option at the top.
On change: call PATCH /api/vault/tasks/[id] with { assignee: selectedAgentName } (or null for unassigned).
On success: update the local task ref to reflect the new assignee; show a brief success indicator (green checkmark for 2s).
On error: show an inline error and revert to the previous value.
Check that PATCH /api/vault/tasks/[id] in app/server/api/vault/tasks/[id].ts already accepts the assignee field. If not, add it to the allowed patch fields — do not break existing fields.
acceptance_criteria: Task detail page shows current assignee or 'Unassigned'.
Clicking the edit icon opens a dropdown of all registered agents.
Selecting an agent and confirming updates the task's assignee in the vault file and reflects immediately in the UI.
Selecting '— Unassigned' clears the assignee field.
PATCH endpoint accepts assignee without breaking existing task fields (status, progress, etc.).
completion_summary: Added an assignee picker to the task detail page with assign and unassign support using the existing PATCH task lifecycle endpoint.
